event.description: Forwards a single GitHub telemetry event to a host connection that opted into telemetry redirection for the session.

params.description: Payload for a `gitHubTelemetry.event` notification: a single GitHub telemetry event the runtime forwards to a host connection that opted into telemetry redirection for the session.

os_platform.description: Operating system platform (e.g. darwin, linux, win32).

is_staff.description: Whether the user is a GitHub/Microsoft staff member.

dev_device_id.description: Stable machine identifier for the device.

GitHubTelemetryClientInfo.description: Client environment metadata describing the process that produced a telemetry event.
GitHubTelemetryClientInfo.title: GitHubTelemetryClientInfo

created_at.description: Timestamp when the event was created (ISO 8601 format).

model_call_id.description: Reference to the model call that produced this event.

properties.description: String-valued properties as a map from key to value.

metrics.description: Numeric metrics as a map from key to value.

features.description: Feature flags enabled for this session, as a map from flag to value.

session_id.description: Session identifier the event belongs to.

copilot_tracking_id.description: Copilot tracking ID for user-level attribution.

GitHubTelemetryEvent.description: A single telemetry event in the runtime's native GitHub-shaped telemetry format, forwarded verbatim to opted-in hosts. The `restricted` flag on the enclosing GitHubTelemetryNotification distinguishes standard from restricted events; the payload shape is identical for both.
GitHubTelemetryEvent.title: GitHubTelemetryEvent

sessionId.description: Session the telemetry event belongs to.

restricted.description: Whether this is a restricted telemetry event (cli.restricted_telemetry). Hosts must route restricted events to first-party Microsoft stores only.

event.description: The telemetry event, in the runtime's native GitHub-shaped telemetry format.

GitHubTelemetryNotification.description: Payload for a `gitHubTelemetry.event` notification: a single GitHub telemetry event the runtime forwards to a host connection that opted into telemetry redirection for the session.
GitHubTelemetryNotification.title: GitHubTelemetryNotification
